mapper.sql: id, session_id, user_id, exam_type, total_questions, current_index, exam_status, exam_plan_json, fluency_and_coherence, lexical_resource, grammatical_range_and_accuracy, pronunciation, overall_score, final_feedback, started_time, completed_time, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO speaking_session ( session_id, user_id, exam_type, total_questions, current_index, exam_status, exam_plan_json, fluency_and_coherence, lexical_resource, grammatical_range_and_accuracy, pronunciation, overall_score, final_feedback, started_time, completed_time, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{examType}, #{totalQuestions}, #{currentIndex}, #{examStatus}, #{examPlanJson}, #{fluencyAndCoherence}, #{lexicalResource}, #{grammaticalRangeAndAccuracy}, #{pronunciation}, #{overallScore}, #{finalFeedback}, #{startedTime}, #{completedTime}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE speaking_session SET session_id = #{sessionId}, user_id = #{userId}, exam_type = #{examType}, total_questions = #{totalQuestions}, current_index = #{currentIndex}, exam_status = #{examStatus}, exam_plan_json = #{examPlanJson}, fluency_and_coherence = #{fluencyAndCoherence}, lexical_resource = #{lexicalResource}, grammatical_range_and_accuracy = #{grammaticalRangeAndAccuracy}, pronunciation = #{pronunciation}, overall_score = #{overallScore}, final_feedback = #{finalFeedback}, started_time = #{startedTime}, completed_time = #{completedTime}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exam_status = 'COMPLETED' ORDER BY completed_time DESC, id DESC
